title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 159.19 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: EUR/USD
text: EUR/USD trading above 1.1711, with ECB rate at 2.00% and Fed rate at 3.75%; rate divergence favours USD, but EUR/USD holding above support.

title: CFTC — EUR
text: EUR net long position at 77.3% (lev_net=+1,029); watch for potential long squeeze if EUR/USD breaks down.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 19.5 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, but watch for potential shifts in market sentiment.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD trading above 0.7072, with RBA hiking rates; AUD carry supported, but watch for potential pullbacks.
